priorities.title: S17 Scope Amendment #1 BLOCKER: lobbyScreen.ts double-offset positioning bug (Connect button rendered at stage (2090,940) off-screen right by 170px; host code-text + host button also mispositioned) + missing Enter-key handler on inputEl. Fix: change 3 absolute-coord position.set calls to pane-relative; extract attemptJoin private method invoked from both pointertap and keydown(Enter); add 3 new position-bounds tests via getConnectButtonCanvasBounds/getHostButtonCanvasBounds/getHostCodeTextCanvasPos pure helpers (S10 pattern).

Custom-domain ready-to-ship commit prep (vite.config base '/the-spark/' -> '/'; public/CNAME=spark-online.space NEW; LOCKED §13.9 deferred to after-push). Push GATED on user explicit confirm after DNS+Pages-Custom-Domain toggle.

Phase-2 C Sever-as-disruption: world.ts SEVER_BOND adds playerId + cross-player auth (hostile if EITHER endpoint placerColor != actor.color per Gemini #3) + charge-consume only on destructive sever (cycle-bond no-consume per PRIME-AUDIT B) + 1v1 input gate; controls.ts passes playerId; ui.ts adds per-player charge dots; save.ts schema adds disruptionCharges+buildActions; net/protocol.ts intent envelope audit; 17+ existing SEVER_BOND test dispatches migrated; 10 new tests.

Phase-2 F Multi-color bond rendering: bondVisualRenderer.ts BondVisualParams.color -> colorA+colorB; drawDefaultLine uses 4-sub-segment stroke decomposition with lerpColor pure helper (Pixi v8 no-native-gradient); 12 magic silhouettes accent with colorB; structureRenderer.ts caller sources placerColor (Gemini #1 BLOCKER); same-color fast-path; 6 new tests.

Closeout: LOCKED amendments (§13.9 if P0 pushed; §VIII.3 row 1 NEW; §VI.4 multi-tone rendering NEW); BETA badge text update; BACKLOG S17 entry; reflexion log; boot-snapshot regen; PDR archive; HANDOFF rotate.
